commands.repair_reason: No automated repair is needed; the patch has no blocking findings after the proof update, so the remaining action is normal maintainer review and CI.; Cleared: The diff only changes agent prompt text and a focused test expectation; it does not alter dependencies, scripts, permissions, credentials, or code execution paths. commands.review_summary:
This PR updates the agent system prompt's Model Aliases guidance and the focused system-prompt test so explicit provider/model refs are not encouraged to be rewritten to aliases.

Reproducibility: yes. for the source-level root cause: configuring model aliases makes current main render prompt text that tells the model to prefer aliases for overrides. I did not establish a deterministic live LLM provider swap because that behavior depends on model choices after reading the prompt.
commands.review_followup: No automated repair is needed; the patch has no blocking findings after the proof update, so the remaining action is normal maintainer review and CI.

target.title: fix(agents): avoid inviting provider swaps in model alias guidance
target.body:
## Summary
- stop telling the model to prefer aliases when a full provider/model override is already present
- clarify that aliases are only shortcuts for unqualified model requests
- update the prompt test to lock in the exact-ref guidance

## Real behavior proof
Configured a real alias map and checked the generated system prompt text on this branch against current `main`.

Config used:
```yaml
agents:
  defaults:
    models:
      github-copilot/gpt-4.1:
        alias: copilot-4.1
      openai/gpt-4.1:
        alias: openai-4.1
```

Prompt excerpt on current `main`:
```text
## Model Aliases
Prefer aliases when specifying model overrides; full provider/model is also accepted.
- copilot-4.1: github-copilot/gpt-4.1
- openai-4.1: openai/gpt-4.1
```

Prompt excerpt on this branch:
```text
## Model Aliases
Use exact provider/model strings verbatim when one is specified. Aliases are shortcuts for unqualified model requests.
- copilot-4.1: github-copilot/gpt-4.1
- openai-4.1: openai/gpt-4.1
```

That is the model-facing prompt change behind the reported provider swap: with aliases configured, the branch no longer tells the model to rewrite an explicit `provider/model` override into an alias.

## Testing
- `pnpm vitest src/agents/system-prompt.test.ts`

Closes #61949
